headline: Bride Asks Guests To 'Venmo Their Gift' Before The Ceremony, Groom Walks Out
summary: The Venmo request read 'please send money so I know you love me.' The groom did not RSVP to the marriage.
fullBody: Bridezilla McCashGrab sent a mass Venmo request to all 200 wedding guests with the note 'gift payment due before ceremony.' The groom, Jake FinallyEnough, reportedly looked at his phone, looked at his bride, and walked out. 'I'm not marrying a QR code,' Jake said on his way out. The Venmo requests have since been refunded. The venue is now available for 'elopements and other financially responsible events.'
